title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.110 - Division fences to be kept in repair
text:
272.110.  Division fences to be kept in repair. — Every person owning a part of a division fence shall keep his or her portion of the same in good repair according to the requirements of this chapter, and may enter upon any land lying adjacent thereto for such purpose.
(RSMo 1939 § 14579, A.L. 2001 H.B. 219 merged with S.B. 462) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12916; 1919 § 5521; 1909 § 6464
